problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
